title: Monday Forums in Wordpress
excerpt: I have been using Monday.com’s forms in my company website for a while now. However, as of a few days ago there seems to be an error where you can no longer scroll on the form. Did something change on Monday’s side to ca…

posts.author: Jeffrey23 (Jeffrey Brunk)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been using Monday.com’s forms in my company website for a while now. However, as of a few days ago there seems to be an error where you can no longer scroll on the form. Did something change on Monday’s side to cause this issue? If so, how do I fix it?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I haven’t had this issue. Is it all your users or only some? ie could it be a browser/cache issue?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Jeffrey23 (Jeffrey Brunk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Desiree,

It is all of my users. However, we think it is because Make.com did an update and it really interfered with the forms connection. So you may find other users having the same issue.
